title: tag: Support tagging manifest list instead of resolving to images
body:
Following commit makes sure when podman tag is invoked on a manifest
list, it tags the same manifest list instead of resolving to an image and
tagging it.

Port of: https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/3483
Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12046 
**Needs Backport**: to **v3.4 RPM** and **4.0.0-dev source**

comments.body: Needs Backport: to v3.4 RPM and 4.0.0-dev source
@vrothberg I dont exactly know i assumed its a tag/release since @cevich mentioned in the issue https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12046
